name: air-quality
description: Get air quality data from Open-Meteo Air Quality API. Returns AQI indices (US and European), particulate matter, pollutant concentrations, and pollen data.

current.description: Current AQ variables. Options: european_aqi, us_aqi, pm10, pm2_5, carbon_monoxide, nitrogen_dioxide, sulphur_dioxide, ozone, uv_index, uv_index_clear_sky

hourly.description: Hourly AQ variables. Options: european_aqi, european_aqi_pm2_5, european_aqi_pm10, european_aqi_nitrogen_dioxide, european_aqi_ozone, european_aqi_sulphur_dioxide, us_aqi, us_aqi_pm2_5, us_aqi_pm10, us_aqi_nitrogen_dioxide, us_aqi_ozone, us_aqi_sulphur_dioxide, us_aqi_carbon_monoxide, pm10, pm2_5, carbon_monoxide, nitrogen_dioxide, sulphur_dioxide, ozone, dust, uv_index, uv_index_clear_sky, alder_pollen, birch_pollen, grass_pollen, mugwort_pollen, olive_pollen, ragweed_pollen
